data.title: Auto Stocks Rise On Trump's Comments About Supporting U.S. Car Companies
data.description: Shares of major automakers such as Ford Motors Inc. (NYSE: F), General Motos Inc. (NYSE: GM) and Stellantis Inc. (NYSE: STLA) are trading higher Monday after President Donald Trump indicated he wants to support car companies navigating recent trade changes.

data.title: Bank Of America Q1 Earnings Preview: Can Warren Buffett's Favorite Continue Beating Estimates?
What's Going On With Longevity Health Shares Monday?
data.description: Longevity announced it entered into a merger agreement with 20/20 BioLabs.

data.title: Brazil Approves Valneva's Mosquito-Borne Chikungunya Vaccine
data.description: Valneva's chikungunya vaccine Ixchiq receives Brazil approval, enabling expanded trials and access across Latin America and endemic regions.

data.title: Ironwood Pharmaceuticals Stock Plunges, FDA Wants Another Trial For Gastrointestinal Drug
data.description: Ironwood must run a new Phase 3 trial after FDA talks, delaying its SBS drug approval despite strong results from prior studies.
